scope: Complete the currently unblocked local and deterministic staging boundary for phases A1, A2, B1, B2, B3, C1, C2, C3, D1, D2, D3, E1 and bounded F1-F5 slices.

phase_status.proof: SQLite source/message/requirement/evidence graph, idempotent ingestion, exact text, coordinates, duplicates, fragments, reproduction views and transaction rollback tests.
No-gaps report and synthesis coverage validator with explicit exclusions and unresolved-fragment checks.
Validated task contracts, autonomy ceilings, quotas, tool boundaries, approvals and rollback metadata.
Fail-closed high-risk policy engine and credential-reference readiness checks with raw-secret detection.
Append-only audit records, deduplicated alerts, health/status dashboard contracts and deterministic local recovery boundary.
Deterministic cache/local/free/paid route classes with capability, cost, privacy and reliability gates.
Licence, security, maintenance, duplication, cost and data-access quarantine gate; staging-adapter-only approval.
Truthful runtime vocabulary counts, requirement rows, no-gaps output and active alerts dashboard payload.
Policy preflight and exact fail-closed owner-approval outcomes for high-risk actions.
Immutable audit events and deduplicated acknowledgement-ready alert records.
HMAC signed envelopes, freshness verification, idempotency records and replay-age rejection.
Deterministic read-only CFO net-worth, stress and coverage scenario slice.
Research-only holdings, price and illustrative-yield scenario slice.
Paper-only order execution with cash and maximum-position risk gates.
Bounded agency contribution, margin and contribution-per-hour model; no revenue claim.
SaaS staging gate that blocks failed tests/security and refuses production/billing paths.

truth_boundary.completed_now: Dependency-free implementation and deterministic local/staging contracts for the listed phases.
not_claimed: connected provider or database staging proof
live Xero, banking, exchange, CRM or billing integration

rollback: Revert the squash merge for this tranche; the implementation adds a new isolated package, test suite, workflow and registry without altering existing runtime paths.
